overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a black coat and hat walking through a rainy night in a historic frontier town. The character traverses muddy streets, passes a tram, and enters a covered market area with meat stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy street with green canvas market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy street beside wooden market stalls with green canvas awnings

entered.detail: multi-story historic building with arched windows and hotel signage
green fabric canopy over wooden market stalls
wooden crates and tables under the green awning
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy street during a heavy rainstorm, passing by the Hotel Chevalier on the left and green canvas market stalls on the right. Gas lamps illuminate the wet cobblestones and wooden facades of the historic buildings.

events.description: electric tram passes from left to right across the muddy street

agents.ego_description: walking across the muddy street and continuing along the road as a tram passes by

notable_agents.action: tram moving along tracks from left to right, partially blocking the view

entered.detail: green electric tram with large windows moving along tracks
large wooden freight wagon with distinctive red spoked wheels
two-story building with balcony and signage reading SAILMAKER & SHIP CHANDLER

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the open street as a tram passes by on the left. Large wooden wagons with red wheels line the right side of the muddy road, and historic storefronts with balconies are visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: octagonal covered market with meat stalls

events.description: enters the covered octagonal market building from the muddy street

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the round market building, walking past meat stalls and a working butcher

notable_agents.action: butcher in white apron working at a meat cutting table

entered.detail: octagonal wooden structure with green canvas roof and open sides
wooden table with raw meat and cutting tools
cured meats hanging from wooden beams overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a round octagonal market building with a green canvas roof, sheltering from the rain. Inside, meat stalls display hanging cured meats and a butcher works at a cutting table. Wooden barrels and crates fill the market floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered walkway with metal fencing

events.description: exits the main market floor into a narrow covered alleyway with metal gates

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered corridor with metal cage fencing on the right side

entered.detail: wooden beam ceiling with hanging electric lamps
tall black metal bars and gates lining the right side of the corridor
simple wooden bench against the metal fencing

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open market floor into a narrow covered walkway with a wooden beam ceiling and hanging lamps. Metal fence gates line the right side, and the corridor leads deeper into the market complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched frontier street into the sheltered depths of a covered market. It begins with the character walking along a muddy road past the Hotel Chevalier and green canvas stalls, where gas lamps cast a glow over wet cobblestones. As the character moves further into the open street, a tram passes by on the left while red-wheeled wooden wagons line the muddy path toward distant balconies. The scene then shifts as the character enters a large octagonal market building, moving from the heavy rain into a sheltered space filled with hanging cured meats, butchers, and wooden barrels. Finally, the camera follows the character from the open market floor into a narrow covered walkway with a wooden beam ceiling and hanging lamps that leads deeper into the complex.
